category_sources: Official page describes dwdiff as a diff program operating at word level.
source_facts.description: "Diff that operates at the word level".
docs_sources: Official dwdiff page documents behavior, options summary, downloads, contact, and license.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official page provides source downloads but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official page compares dwdiff with wdiff and documents whitespace/delimiter behavior.
